name: Alertness
summary: +2 Perception and +2 Sense Motive (or +4 each at 10 ranks).

name: Athletic
summary: +2 Climb and +2 Swim (or +4 each at 10 ranks).

name: Cleave
summary: As a standard action: make a single melee attack at full BAB; if it hits, make one additional attack at the same BAB against an adjacent foe also threatened by you. -2 AC until next turn.

name: Combat Expertise
summary: Take a -1 to attack to gain +1 dodge AC (-2/+2 at BAB +4, etc., up to BAB/+4).

name: Combat Reflexes
summary: Number of attacks of opportunity per round = 1 + Dex modifier; can take AoOs while flat-footed.

name: Diehard
summary: When at 0 or fewer HP, automatically stable. Can choose to act as if disabled rather than dying, even at negative HP, until reaching -CON HP.

name: Dodge
summary: +1 dodge bonus to AC.

name: Empower Spell
summary: All variable, numeric effects of an empowered spell are increased by half. Empowered spell uses a slot 2 levels higher than the spell's actual level.

name: Maximize Spell
summary: All variable, numeric effects of a maximized spell are maximized. Maximized spell uses a slot 3 levels higher than the spell's actual level.

name: Still Spell
summary: Cast spell without somatic component. Stilled spell uses a slot 1 level higher than the spell's actual level.

name: Silent Spell
summary: Cast spell without verbal component. Silent spell uses a slot 1 level higher than the spell's actual level.

name: Quicken Spell
summary: Cast spell as a swift action. Quickened spell uses a slot 4 levels higher than the spell's actual level.

name: Extend Spell
summary: Spell duration is doubled. Extended spell uses a slot 1 level higher than the spell's actual level.

name: Endurance
summary: +4 on checks for prolonged exertion (Constitution checks for running, holding breath, etc., Swim checks to avoid taking damage from prolonged swim, and forced-march Constitution checks). Can sleep in light/medium armor without becoming fatigued.

name: Eschew Materials
summary: Cast spells without material components costing 1 gp or less.

name: Great Fortitude
summary: +2 on Fortitude saves.

name: Improved Initiative
summary: +4 on initiative checks.

name: Improved Unarmed Strike
summary: Treated as armed when unarmed. Unarmed strikes deal lethal damage and do not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Iron Will
summary: +2 on Will saves.

name: Lightning Reflexes
summary: +2 on Reflex saves.

name: Persuasive
summary: +2 Diplomacy and +2 Intimidate (or +4 each at 10 ranks).

name: Point-Blank Shot
summary: +1 on attack and damage rolls with ranged weapons against opponents within 30 feet.

name: Power Attack
summary: Take a -1 to attack to gain +2 to melee damage (+3 with two-handed weapons), scaling at higher BAB.

name: Precise Shot
summary: No -4 penalty for shooting into melee.

name: Rapid Shot
summary: When making a full-attack with a ranged weapon, may make one additional attack at the highest base attack bonus, but all attacks take a -2 penalty.

name: Run
summary: Run at 5x speed (4x in heavy armor) and retain Dex bonus to AC while running. +4 on Acrobatics for running long jumps.

name: Scribe Scroll
summary: Create scrolls. Cost in gold = spell level x caster level x 12.5 gp; takes 2 hours per 250 gp of value.

name: Skill Focus
summary: +3 to a chosen skill (+6 at 10 ranks).

name: Spell Focus
summary: +1 DC for all spells of the chosen school.

name: Spell Penetration
summary: +2 caster level checks to overcome spell resistance.

name: Stealthy
summary: +2 Escape Artist and +2 Stealth (or +4 each at 10 ranks).

name: Toughness
summary: +3 HP at 1st level, +1 HP per Hit Die thereafter (minimum +3).

name: Two-Weapon Fighting
summary: Reduce two-weapon penalties: -2/-2 with a light off-hand weapon, -4/-4 otherwise.

name: Weapon Finesse
summary: Use Dex modifier instead of Str modifier on melee attack rolls with light weapons, rapiers, whips, and spiked chains.

name: Weapon Focus
summary: +1 attack with the chosen weapon (must be proficient).

name: Mounted Combat
summary: Once per round when your mount is hit, attempt a Ride check (DC = the attack roll) to negate the hit.

name: Spirited Charge
summary: When mounted and using a charge, deal double damage on the charge attack (×3 with a lance).

name: Ride-By Attack
summary: When mounted and using a charge, move and attack as a single action and continue movement past the target without provoking AoOs.

name: Trample
summary: While mounted, may attempt overruns; opponents knocked prone are dealt mount's hoof damage.

name: Deceitful
summary: +2 Bluff and +2 Disguise (+4 each at 10 ranks).

name: Deft Hands
summary: +2 Disable Device and +2 Sleight of Hand (+4 each at 10 ranks).

name: Magical Aptitude
summary: +2 Spellcraft and +2 Use Magic Device (+4 each at 10 ranks).

name: Self-Sufficient
summary: +2 Heal and +2 Survival (+4 each at 10 ranks).

name: Animal Affinity
summary: +2 Handle Animal and +2 Ride (+4 each at 10 ranks).

name: Acrobatic
summary: +2 Acrobatics and +2 Fly (+4 each at 10 ranks).

name: Improved Critical
summary: Doubles the threat range of a chosen weapon. Doesn't stack with keen edge or similar.

name: Vital Strike
summary: When using the attack action, roll the weapon's damage dice twice (only on a single attack action — not iterative or full attacks).

name: Improved Vital Strike
summary: Like Vital Strike, but roll damage dice three times.

name: Greater Vital Strike
summary: Like Vital Strike, but roll damage dice four times.

name: Weapon Specialization
summary: +2 damage with the chosen weapon.

name: Greater Weapon Focus
summary: +1 attack with the chosen weapon (stacks with Weapon Focus → +2 total).

name: Greater Weapon Specialization
summary: +2 damage with the chosen weapon (stacks with Weapon Specialization → +4 total).

name: Two-Weapon Defense
summary: While wielding two weapons, gain +1 shield bonus to AC. When fighting defensively or using total defense, doubles to +2.

name: Improved Two-Weapon Fighting
summary: Make one extra off-hand attack at -5 cumulative.

name: Greater Two-Weapon Fighting
summary: Make one further off-hand attack at -10 cumulative.

name: Reactionary
summary: (trait alternative) +2 initiative; can re-roll initiative once per encounter.

name: Improved Iron Will
summary: Once per day after a failed Will save, you may re-roll it.

name: Improved Great Fortitude
summary: Once per day after a failed Fortitude save, you may re-roll it.

name: Improved Lightning Reflexes
summary: Once per day after a failed Reflex save, you may re-roll it.

name: Greater Spell Focus
summary: +1 DC for all spells of the chosen school (stacks with Spell Focus → +2 total).

name: Greater Spell Penetration
summary: +2 caster-level checks to overcome SR (stacks with Spell Penetration → +4 total).

name: Augment Summoning
summary: Each summoned creature gets +4 enhancement to Strength and Constitution for the duration of the spell.

name: Natural Spell
summary: Cast spells while in wild shape using only verbal/material components from the form's vocal range.

name: Wild Shape
summary: Druid class feature gating Natural Spell.

name: Improved Grapple
summary: Initiate grapple without provoking. +2 to grapple CMB and CMD.

name: Improved Disarm
summary: Disarm without provoking. +2 to disarm CMB and to CMD against disarms.

name: Improved Trip
summary: Trip without provoking. +2 to trip CMB and to CMD against trips.

name: Improved Sunder
summary: Sunder without provoking. +2 to sunder CMB and to CMD against sunders.

name: Improved Bull Rush
summary: Bull rush without provoking. +2 to bull rush CMB and to CMD against bull rushes.

name: Improved Overrun
summary: Overrun without provoking. +2 to overrun CMB. Targets cannot avoid overrun.

name: Improved Feint
summary: Feint as a move action.

name: Deadly Aim
summary: Take -1 to ranged attack rolls to gain +2 to ranged damage (scales with BAB, like Power Attack).

name: Manyshot
summary: When making a full-attack with a bow, the first attack fires two arrows that share a single attack roll.

name: Improved Precise Shot
summary: Ignore concealment less than total and the cover bonus less than total cover from intervening combatants.

name: Shot on the Run
summary: When making a full-round move, you may break it up to make a single ranged attack at any point.

name: Spring Attack
summary: When making a full-round move, you may break it up to make a single melee attack at any point. Doesn't provoke AoO from the target for the move.

name: Mobility
summary: +4 dodge AC against attacks of opportunity caused by movement.

name: Whirlwind Attack
summary: As a full-round action, make a single melee attack against every opponent in reach.

name: Stunning Fist
summary: Once per day per 4 levels (or per monk level), declare an unarmed strike that stuns on a hit unless target makes a Fort save (DC 10 + 1/2 char level + Wis mod) for 1 round.

name: Deflect Arrows
summary: Once per round, when targeted by a ranged attack you're aware of, treat it as a miss.

name: Snatch Arrows
summary: When you would deflect an arrow, you may catch it instead. Thrown weapons can be hurled back as a free action.

name: Brew Potion
summary: Create potions of spells of 3rd level or lower. Cost: spell level × caster level × 50 gp; 1 day per 1,000 gp of base price.

name: Craft Wand
summary: Create wands of spells of 4th level or lower (50 charges).

name: Craft Wondrous Item
summary: Create wondrous magic items (cloaks, headbands, rings, etc.).

name: Craft Magic Arms and Armor
summary: Create magic weapons, armor, and shields.

name: Craft Rod
summary: Create magic rods.

name: Craft Staff
summary: Create magic staves.

name: Forge Ring
summary: Create magic rings.

name: Leadership
summary: Attract a cohort and a number of followers, based on Leadership score.

name: Blind-Fight
summary: Re-roll miss chance from concealment. Half-speed (instead of 1/4) when blinded.

name: Simple Weapon Proficiency
summary: Proficiency with all simple weapons.

name: Martial Weapon Proficiency
summary: Proficiency with one martial weapon.

name: Exotic Weapon Proficiency
summary: Proficiency with one exotic weapon.

name: Armor Proficiency, Light
summary: Proficiency with light armor.

name: Armor Proficiency, Medium
summary: Proficiency with medium armor.

name: Armor Proficiency, Heavy
summary: Proficiency with heavy armor.

name: Shield Proficiency
summary: Proficiency with all shields except tower shields.

name: Tower Shield Proficiency
summary: Proficiency with tower shields.
